title: Quick List of Projects
content:
H﻿ere are some of my projects!

## [E﻿E](https://github.com/anoraktrend/ee-fbsd)

### Occasionally Active

E﻿E is short for Easy Editor, it's a console based text editor with tui elements. I occasionally maintain an extracted version from FreeBSD.

## [A﻿EE](https://github.com/anoraktrend/aee)

### Occasionally Active

A﻿EE is a superset of EE that has some neat features. I'm occasionally working on an updated build system and documentation for it along with some friends.

## [K﻿inland](kinland.helltop.net)

### Archived

This was an Unfiction project that I made as a birthday and anniversary gift for my fiancée.

## [Berkeley Artistic license](https://github.com/anoraktrend/Berkeley-Artistic)

### [](https://github.com/anoraktrend/Berkeley-Artistic)N﻿ot Yet OSI Approved, may alter name.

An open source license I wrote for fun. Currently working on making it a good license.
